description: Merger-Arb Book Risk Monitor - joins the firm book's Merger-Arb sleeve to the Spread Desk's per-deal record and models deal-break risk: cluster break, worst-quartile break, deal-risk-weighted expected P&L and full-close carry. data/merger-arb-risk.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Merger-Arb Book Risk Monitor - daily 03:30 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, after the firm Stress Desk, completing the firm risk stack on a fresh consolidated book.
